channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: What is the release date for Marshals: A Yellowstone Story episode 5 on CBS and Paramount+?
item.description: Who left the gun shell on Kayce's porch? And when does Marshals: A Yellowstone Story episode 5 hit CBS and Paramount+?

item.title: NYT Connections hints today: Clues, answers for March 27, 2026
item.description: Connections is a New York Times word game that's all about finding the "common threads between words." How to solve the puzzle.

item.title: NYT Strands hints, answers for March 27, 2026
item.description: The NYT Strands hints and answers you need to make the most of your puzzling experience.

item.title: Wordle today: Answer, hints for March 27, 2026
item.description: Here's the answer for "Wordle" #1742 on March 27 as well as a few hints, tips, and clues to help you solve it yourself.

item.title: Amazons Big Spring Sale is surprisingly good: We found 111+ deals on Apple, DJI, Sony, and Dyson
item.description: Amazon's Big Spring Sale is back from March 25 to 31. Take $100 off Apple Watch Series 11, 60% off Shark robot vacuums, and grab Kindles for $95.

item.title: Home Depot is giving away free power tools again, plus furniture and decor deals during Amazons spring sale
item.description: Is Home Depot having a spring sale? Kind of. We found deals on cordless tools and lawn mowers, plus bedding, decor, rugs, and more.

item.title: David Sacks is done as AI czar — here’s what he’s doing instead
item.description: Sacks will be much further from power center in Washington than since the outset of this second Trump administration.

item.title: Anthropic wins injunction against Trump administration over Defense Department saga
item.description: A federal judge has ordered that the Trump administration rescind recent restrictions it placed on the AI company.

item.title: Amazon Big Spring Sale 2026: Live updates on Apple, Kindle, DJI, and Brooklinen deals
item.description: Get live updates on the Amazon Big Spring Sale 2026. We found record-low prices on Apple MacBooks, DJI drones, Kindles, Sony XM6 headphones, and more.

item.title: Amazon sales are notorious for these classic deals — save on Amazon devices, camping gear, AirPods, and more
item.description: Shop 9 classic Amazon deals during Amazon Big Spring Sale to save on Apple AirPods, Amazon devices, and more.

item.title: Im a tech editor, and I found 40+ Big Spring Sale tech deals at Amazon Id actually buy
item.description: I'm a tech editor, and I found the top tech deals from Amazon's Big Spring Sale. Grab Sony headphones for $48, Kindles for $94, and $250 off MacBooks.
